name: bots
description: Claude Code plugins by Bold Minds — bootstrapped founder tools, personal growth, and operational skills

plugins.name: ladder
plugins.description: Personal growth companion — turns intentions into externally-bound commitments, tracks progress with honest data, and refuses to let rationalizations go unchallenged. Calibrated to your personality via the Enneagram.

plugins.name: biz
plugins.description: Bootstrapped SaaS CEO companion — brings the scar tissue, frameworks, and push-back of a repeat founder to every business decision. Keeps you honest about numbers, ruthless about scope, and focused on shipping.
